title: Cyient Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cyient Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cyient Capital India has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
